operations.description: Returns toestanden sorted latest → oldest by validFrom. Defaults to the latest 10. Use limit/offset to page, from/to (YYYY-MM-DD) to window by validFrom, or includeAll=true to bypass paging (ETL use only). Each item carries the consolidated PDF separately from amendment PDFs (Stb/Stcrt/Trb publications).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive lower bound on validFrom (YYYY-MM-DD). Items with null validFrom are excluded when set.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive upper bound on validFrom (YYYY-MM-DD). Items with null validFrom are excluded when set.

parameters.name: includeAll
parameters.description: Bypass paging and return every toestand (ETL use only). Default: false.

WettenOverheidNlBwbVersionsResponse.description: Available versions (toestanden) of a BWB document

total.description: Total toestand count after from/to filtering, before paging

returned.description: Number of items in this response after paging

versions.description: Toestanden, sorted latest → oldest by validFrom

WettenOverheidNlBwbVersionItem.description: A single version (toestand) of a BWB law

toestandId.description: Toestand identifier (format: {bwbId}_{validFrom}_{seq}); use as toestandId parameter

validTo.description: Version valid to date (null if open-ended)

url.description: Canonical wetten.overheid.nl URL with toestand date

textUrl.description: cdx-nl:// URL to fetch this toestand's text

pdf.description: Consolidated PDF for this toestand; null when not rendered yet

amendmentPdfs.description: Amendment PDFs (Stb/Stcrt/Trb publications) — empty list if none

WettenOverheidNlBwbAttachmentRef.description: Reference to a PDF attachment hosted on the BWB document
